titleStmt.title: (Anna Ernestine) Catharina (Käthe) Oppel (née Brebeck)
born Neuss, August 30, 1884; died Berlin, April 1955

publicationStmt.publisher: Schenker Documents Online in association with the Centre for Computing in the Humanities

sourceDesc.p: No source: created in electronic format.

encodingDesc.p: Encoding according to the CCH TEI Guidelines

div.p: The first wife of Reinhard Oppel.

The couple were married on April 18, 1906 in Bonn, and divorced on March 17, 1910 in Munich. They adopted two children: Ingeborg Maria in 1907, and Wolf Dietrich in 1908. Presumably after the couple’s divorce their mother had custody, as a result of which the children do not feature in the Oppel–Schenker correspondence during Heinrich’s life, but do appear in the post-1935 correspondence of Reinhard with Jeanette Schenker.
